<!-- Thanks for contributing to Tenantry! Please complete the checklist below. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Line coverage stays **≥ 90%** (the CI coverage gate)
- [ ] No new analyzer, trim (`IL2xxx`), or AOT (`IL3xxx`) warnings — the build treats warnings as errors
- [ ] Public API changes are documented (XML docs) and noted below
- [ ] Docs under `docs/` updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials committed

## Public API impact
